scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && tailwindcss -i css/tailwind.input.css -o dist/tailwind.css --minify && esbuild src/sim.js --bundle --format=iife --outfile=dist/sim.bundle.js --sourcemap && cp index.html css/sim.css dist/
scripts.lint: eslint lib/ src/ tests/ && stylelint css/sim.css && htmlhint index.html && depcruise lib/ src/ --config .dependency-cruiser.js && knip
scripts.format: prettier --write lib/ src/ tests/ css/sim.css index.html
scripts.format:check: prettier --check lib/ src/ tests/ css/sim.css index.html
